name: Tyk (Open Source API Gateway & Management)
pricing_notes: Open source (MPL-2.0); Tyk Technologies; commercial dashboard and features

auth.notes: Built-in auth: API keys, OAuth 2.0, JWT, mutual TLS, basic auth

performance.notes: Go-based; high throughput; lower resource usage than Kong

agent_readiness.notes: Go-based API gateway. Rate limiting, auth, analytics, developer portal. REST API or Tyk Operator (Kubernetes CRD). API definitions as JSON. GraphQL support. Middleware via Go plugins or virtual endpoints (JS). Redis for rate limiting/storage. Tyk Dashboard (commercial) for UI. Self-hosted or Tyk Cloud. Better resource efficiency than Kong. OpenAPI import. gRPC proxying.

gotchas: Full feature set (dashboard, developer portal) requires commercial license
Go plugin development requires Go compilation
best_when: API gateway needing good resource efficiency (Go vs Lua/Java)
Teams wanting Kong alternative with lower memory footprint
avoid_when: When Kong's larger plugin ecosystem preferred
Full developer portal without commercial licensing
summary: Tyk is a Go-based API gateway with rate limiting, OAuth, JWT, analytics, GraphQL support, and Kubernetes Operator. Lower resource usage than Kong. Redis-backed. REST API and Kubernetes CRD config. Commercial dashboard and developer portal available. GraphQL proxying and subscription support. Alternative to Kong for teams prioritizing Go performance and memory efficiency.
